privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.section1_content: As the Debate in Civil Society Public Union (DVC), we are dedicated to supporting the personal development of youth and fostering a culture of debate. This Privacy Policy aims to inform you about how your personal data is collected, protected, and managed when using our platform.
privacy_policy.section2_intro: To ensure the full functionality of our services (such as debate club memberships, regional center applications, and AI debate rooms), the following information is collected:
privacy_policy.section2_item1: Registration Data: Name, surname, email address, password, and a unique DVC ID profile.
privacy_policy.section2_item2: Application Data: Motivation letters and contact details submitted when applying to university clubs and regional centers.
privacy_policy.section2_item3: Artificial Intelligence Module: Arguments and speech texts entered during debate simulations with Gemini AI (this data is processed solely for rhetorical analysis and scoring purposes).
privacy_policy.section3_content: All collected personal and application data is stored securely and encrypted within our central cloud database (Supabase). Under no circumstances is your data shared with third parties, sold, or used for commercial purposes without the user's explicit consent.
privacy_policy.section4_content: Every user has the right to access their Personal Dashboard to edit their profile details, monitor the status of their submitted applications, or request the permanent deletion of their account.

terms_of_service.title: Terms of Service
terms_of_service.section1_content: By registering or using the DVC Debate platform, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, you must discontinue using the platform.
terms_of_service.section2_item1: Users are solely responsible for the accuracy of the information provided during registration (First Name, Last Name, Email).
terms_of_service.section2_item2: Each user is assigned a unique DVC ID. Maintaining the confidentiality of account credentials and password security is the user's responsibility.
terms_of_service.section3_title: 3. Rules for Using the Artificial Intelligence (Gemini AI) Module
terms_of_service.section3_item1: In AI Debate rooms, universal ethical standards, constructive criticism, and debate etiquette must be followed.
terms_of_service.section3_item2: Entering abusive language, hate speech, illegal content, or texts violating cultural values into the AI system is strictly prohibited. The system may log such attempts, leading to account suspension.
terms_of_service.section4_title: 4. Applications to Clubs and Regional Centers
terms_of_service.section4_item1: Membership applications to university clubs and regional centers are strictly on a voluntary basis.
terms_of_service.section4_item2: Submitted motivation letters must not violate the copyrights of others (no plagiarism) and must reflect true facts.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question? Want to partner? Write to us or call us.

programs.title: Our Programs
programs.subtitle: DVC implements two main strategic programs to ensure the development of youth in various directions.
programs.mdpDesc: The largest intellectual network in the country that develops the public speaking, critical thinking and research skills of young people. Builds leadership skills through forums, tournaments and training.
programs.youthIncDesc: Incubation and acceleration program to support young entrepreneurs, develop the startup ecosystem and realize innovative ideas. Turn your business idea into reality.
